sources.name: Owner current gameplay rule - no Expedition Tablets
sources.data: Expedition Tablets do not exist in the current game; Expedition runs through logbooks/whispers instead.
sources.limitations: If the owner later reports Expedition Tablets returned in a patch, this rule must be revisited explicitly.

sources.name: Owner current gameplay interpretation - Expedition juice means other tablets
sources.data: When current Expedition notes say to juice Expedition, interpret that as other current tablets, map/waystone modifiers, Atlas Master choices, whispers, and remnant order around Expedition content, not Expedition Tablets.
sources.limitations: Does not make Expedition Tablet current-game-available; imported old Expedition Tablet suffixes still remain legacy only.

conflicts.claim_a: Inherited rule: tablets are Magic only
conflicts.claim_b: PoE2DB: unique tablets exist; Ancient Infuser corrupts/modifies; passives upgrade tablets to Rare / add max modifiers
conflicts.note: RESOLVED 2026-07-05 Phase 10: PoE2DB exposes normal/magic/rare/unique tablet rarity support and official trade filters support rarity. The app keeps rarity filtering and the 4 explicit-mod cap separately.
conflicts.resolution: RESOLVED 2026-07-05 Phase 10: PoE2DB exposes normal/magic/rare/unique tablet rarity support and official trade filters support rarity. The app keeps rarity filtering and the 4 explicit-mod cap separately.

conflicts.resolution: RESOLVED 2026-07-05: official trade text = INCREASED Tribute. Trade search re-enabled.

conflicts.topic: Delirium fog dissipate speed (of the Unending)
conflicts.note: RESOLVED 2026-07-05 Phase 10: official trade2 stats text is "Delirium Fog in Map dissipates #% faster". App uses official text for trade; PoE2DB slower wording is preserved only as a note about possible value-sign encoding.
conflicts.resolution: RESOLVED 2026-07-05 Phase 10: official trade2 stats text is "Delirium Fog in Map dissipates #% faster". App uses official text for trade; PoE2DB slower wording is preserved only as a note about possible value-sign encoding.

conflicts.topic: Delirium of Eternity duplicate stat ID
conflicts.note: RESOLVED 2026-07-05 Phase 10: official duplicate tested with search POST only. explicit.stat_3226351972 returned Delirium Tablet matches; explicit.stat_1174954559 returned 0. App now uses explicit.stat_3226351972 and re-enables the row.
conflicts.resolution: RESOLVED 2026-07-05 Phase 10: official duplicate tested with search POST only. explicit.stat_3226351972 returned Delirium Tablet matches; explicit.stat_1174954559 returned 0. App now uses explicit.stat_3226351972 and re-enables the row.

conflicts.note: RESOLVED 2026-07-05: official trade text is fixed "1 second".
conflicts.resolution: RESOLVED 2026-07-05: official trade text is fixed "1 second".

conflicts.resolution: RESOLVED 2026-07-05 Phase 10: official trade2 stats text confirmed: Delirium Fog in Map applies #% increased Deliriousness to Players. App uses official text.

conflicts.topic: Expedition Tablet existence in current season
conflicts.claim_a: Owner authoritative current-game rule (2026-07-05): Expedition Tablets do not exist now; Expedition uses logbooks/whispers.
conflicts.claim_b: Legacy trade2/PoE2DB/imported-pack data may still list Expedition Tablet.
conflicts.note: RESOLVED 2026-07-05 Phase 11: owner rule is authoritative for current gameplay. App hides Expedition Tablet from active tablet/trade workflows and treats imported Expedition Tablet data as legacy/stale/trade-leftover.
conflicts.resolution: RESOLVED 2026-07-05 Phase 11: owner rule is authoritative for current gameplay. App hides Expedition Tablet from active tablet/trade workflows and treats imported Expedition Tablet data as legacy/stale/trade-leftover.

Waystone optimizer economy scoring and hidden reward-line trade IDs; current pool/ranges are a verified draft

Whether 0.5.4b/hotfixes resolved untargetable-enemy issues for F-rank Expedition maps
